title: CARB Receives Over 80 Public Comments on Third LCFS 15-Day Package
content: CARB has received 81 comments from biofuel groups, OEMs, charging and refueling infrastructure providers and other stakeholders on its third 15-day Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) package. The public comment period concluded on April 21st. cCarbon will soon publish a comprehensive analysis of the comments received.
author: Analysts Account
